name: Terminal Split
description: Terminal-style layout with status bar, resizable split panes, and hotkey bar. Optimized for CLI tool interfaces with monospace typography and ASCII borders.

pane_left.note: Left split pane. Resizable width via drag handle.

pane_right.note: Right split pane. Resizable width via drag handle.

body.note: Split pane body. Supports horizontal, vertical, and quad layouts. Min pane size 100px.

hotkey_bar.note: Keyboard shortcut hints. Each item: kbd badge + label.
